Everson's resignation was submitted in a letter, which is attached to the filing as an exhibit, and he did not serve on any committee of the Board at the time of his resignation. The company believes Everson was granted full access to its books and records, except for certain litigation-related materials, and had previously approved the establishment of the Finance Committee.

items.summary: Fermi Inc. commenced an offering for the sale of $350 million aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2031 to qualified institutional buyers, with the option to purchase an additional $52.5 million. The company intends to use the net proceeds to pay for capped call transactions and for general corporate purposes. Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., has suspended his current proxy campaign to call a special meeting of shareholders due to a judge's last-minute recusal, which has disrupted the timeline for the strategic process.
